module_info.docstring: Tests for tools/clarify_tool.py - Interactive clarifying questions.

methods.name: test_simple_question_with_callback
methods.docstring: Should return user response for simple question.

methods.name: test_question_with_choices
methods.docstring: Should pass choices to callback and return response.

methods.name: test_empty_question_returns_error
methods.docstring: Should return error for empty question.

methods.name: test_whitespace_only_question_returns_error
methods.docstring: Should return error for whitespace-only question.

methods.name: test_no_callback_returns_error
methods.docstring: Should return error when no callback is provided.

methods.name: test_choices_trimmed_to_max
methods.docstring: Should trim choices to MAX_CHOICES.

methods.name: test_empty_choices_become_none
methods.docstring: Empty choices list should become None (open-ended).

methods.name: test_choices_with_only_whitespace_stripped
methods.docstring: Whitespace-only choices should be stripped out.

methods.name: test_invalid_choices_type_returns_error
methods.docstring: Non-list choices should return error.

methods.name: test_choices_converted_to_strings
methods.docstring: Non-string choices should be converted to strings.

methods.name: test_callback_exception_returns_error
methods.docstring: Should return error if callback raises exception.

methods.name: test_callback_receives_stripped_question
methods.docstring: Callback should receive trimmed question.

methods.name: test_user_response_stripped
methods.docstring: User response should be stripped of whitespace.

classes.name: TestCheckClarifyRequirements
classes.docstring: Tests for the requirements check function.

methods.name: test_always_returns_true
methods.docstring: clarify tool has no external requirements.

classes.name: TestClarifySchema
classes.docstring: Tests for the OpenAI function-calling schema.

methods.name: test_schema_name
methods.docstring: Schema should have correct name.

methods.name: test_schema_has_description
methods.docstring: Schema should have a description.

methods.name: test_schema_question_required
methods.docstring: Question parameter should be required.

methods.name: test_schema_choices_optional
methods.docstring: Choices parameter should be optional.

methods.name: test_schema_choices_max_items
methods.docstring: Schema should specify max items for choices.

methods.name: test_max_choices_is_four
methods.docstring: MAX_CHOICES constant should be 4.
